--- ### DO NOT EDIT! Generated by script/update-docs.rb category: manual section: documentation subsection: manual title: Git - diff-context-options Documentation docname: diff-context-options version: 2.51.0 aliases: - "/docs/diff-context-options/2.51.0/index.html" - "/docs/diff-context-options/2.51.1/index.html" - "/docs/diff-context-options/2.51.2/index.html" ---
-U<n>
--unified=<n>

Generate diffs with <n> lines of context. Defaults to diff.context or 3 if the config option is unset.

--inter-hunk-context=<n>

Show the context between diff hunks, up to the specified <number> of lines, thereby fusing hunks that are close to each other. Defaults to diff.interHunkContext or 0 if the config option is unset.
